dillyNarrative: Dilan is a Data Science major at the University of Tampa who has been building things for revenue since high school. He currently runs freelance web development (6 active clients, monthly recurring revenue) and freelance app development (2 apps in progress for clients). He founded the Kochhar Foundation, which raised $22,000 and secured a national sponsor to build computer labs across southern India, reaching 100,000 people. He built an 88%-accurate lease prediction model for a Fort Lauderdale commercial real estate firm and is conducting $7,000-funded research using Apple Watch and Garmin data to predict mental health indicators. He founded a fraternity from scratch and wants to become president of the Data Science Club. His stated goal: raise Dilly into a million-dollar company.

facts.label: Freelance Web Developer
facts.value: Generating monthly revenue through 6 clients by providing them with top-tier sites that increase conversion and drive sales. Portfolio at dilankochhar.com

facts.value: Currently working on 2 apps for clients to run their business on and generate future revenue.

facts.value: Raised $22,000 and garnered a national sponsor to purchase computers for poverty-stricken communities in Southern India, impacting 100,000 people.

dillyNarrative: Hamza Qureshi is a software engineering student who builds applications from scratch in C. He gravitates toward low-level, technically demanding problems and is comfortable with memory management and complex system design. He has only used Dilly briefly, so his profile is early-stage. What Dilly knows about him comes entirely from one conversation: he loves the hardcore nature of building close to the metal, and he deliberately chooses the harder path when there is an easier option.

facts.label: C programming expertise
facts.value: Loves building apps from scratch in C programming language, comfortable with memory management.

facts.label: Enjoys technical challenges
facts.value: Gravitates toward hardcore programming approaches, comfortable with complex technical challenges like memory management.

facts.label: Building apps from scratch
facts.value: Enjoys building applications from the ground up using C programming language.
